name: lyra-creative-writing
description: Workshop-voiced craft pack for prose narrative — fiction and creative nonfiction. Three modes: draft (Claude writes), critique (Claude diagnoses your draft), plan (Claude consults on structure). v0.1 ships router + 13 craft sheets, 3 commands, 8 agents. Workshop tradition: craft as observable skill, both literary and genre fiction valued, formulas treated as heuristics not laws. Sibling to lyra-ux-designer under the Lyra (arts/beauty) faction. Roadmap: v0.2 genre annex, v0.3 other craft lineages (structuralist, genre-mechanical, pluralist), v0.4 format expansion (poetry, scripts, plays, comics, songwriting, IF).
